experiences.company: Data Science Student Society at UC San Diego
experiences.title: Director of Software
description: Leading a team of developers in designing and building full-stack websites for UC San Diego student organizations, using modern web technologies and agile practices.

Organize and deliver workshops on essential software engineering topics, including frontend frameworks, backend architecture, Git/GitHub, containerization, and cloud computing, to help students gain hands-on experience and develop industry-ready skills.

experiences.company: Data Science Student Society at UC San Diego
experiences.title: Software Developer
description: Built responsive frontend features for club websites using React.
Led a workshop on developing a personal portfolio site, guiding students through design, layout, and deployment best practices.
Collaborated with a cross-functional team to deliver clean, user-friendly interfaces for student organizations

experiences.title: Data Engineer Intern
description: Deployed containerized cloud-based web scraper to save $200k+ in operating expenses
Operationalized AI models to transform patient data into study-specific narratives
Deployed scalable data pipelines with AWS serverless functions and Power BI dashboards

experiences.title: Data Science Intern
description: Implementing a social media web scraper to gather data to perform sentiment analysis on current county policies. The goal is to make a public tool for SD Taxpayers and policymakers to see sentiments towards certain policies.

experiences.title: Code Coach
description: Led 4 week-long summer camps, teaching Python fundamentals to over 50 students ages 6–17 through hands-on projects and games.
Provided 1-on-1 tutoring in Lua for Roblox game development, helping students apply programming concepts to interactive, real-world applications.
Fostered a fun and supportive learning environment that encouraged curiosity, problem-solving, and creativity in young coders.
